Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  New patient office visit, level 4  ·  Texas

New patient office visit, level 4 cost in Texas.

Cash-pay range for new patient office visit, level 4 across 24 hospitals in Texas: $21 to $5,733. CPT code 99204. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.
